code:
import string

fn validate(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> String
  mut errs = ""
  if string.is_empty(name)
    errs = "empty-name"
  end
  if age < 0
    if string.is_empty(errs)
      errs = "negative-age"
    else
      errs = "#{errs},negative-age"
    end
  end
  if age > 150
    if string.is_empty(errs)
      errs = "too-old"
    else
      errs = "#{errs},too-old"
    end
  end
  errs
end

fn report(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> Unit
  let e = validate(name, age)
  if string.is_empty(e)
    println("ok")
  else
    println("errors=#{e}")
  end
end

report("", -5)
report("Alice", 30)
report("Bob", 200)
